metadata.title: 11th Pass Phase 4: Runtime Verification — Smoke Test in europe-west4

context.summary: All infrastructure is now in europe-west4. GAR, GCS, Cloud SQL migrated. Docker images pushed. Code updated. 6695 tests pass. Need runtime verification that SkyPilot jobs actually use the new region with zero egress.
context.verified-state: GAR: europe-west4-docker.pkg.dev/minivess-mlops/minivess (base:latest + mlflow:v3.10.0) GCS: minivess-mlops-dvc-data (europe-west4) Cloud SQL: mlflow-db-479b793 (europe-west4) Controller: .sky.yaml pinned to gcp/europe-west4, cpus: 2+, memory: 4+

task.title: Launch DynUNet smoke test in europe-west4
task.description: Single DynUNet job — cheapest, fastest model. Validates: 1. New controller starts in europe-west4 as e2-medium 2. Docker pull is same-region (free, fast) 3. DVC data pulls from GCS 4. Training completes (2 epochs) 5. MLflow metrics logged
task.commands: cd /home/petteri/Dropbox/github-personal/vascadia/deployment/skypilot uv run sky jobs launch train_factorial.yaml \ --env MODEL_FAMILY=dynunet \ --env LOSS_NAME=dice_ce \ --env WITH_AUX_CALIB=false \ --env FOLD_ID=0 \ --env MAX_EPOCHS=2 \ --env MAX_TRAIN_VOLUMES=23 \ --env MAX_VAL_VOLUMES=12 \ --env EXPERIMENT_NAME=smoke_test_europe_west4 \ --env ZERO_SHOT=false \ --env POST_TRAINING_METHODS=none \ --env GRADIENT_CHECKPOINTING=false \ -y

verification.criterion: Job region is europe-west4 (check sky jobs queue)
Controller is e2-medium (check gcloud compute instances list)

task.title: Verify controller instance type and region
task.description: After T1 launches, verify the new controller was created correctly.
task.commands: uv run sky status gcloud compute instances list --project=minivess-mlops \ --filter="zone:europe-west4-*" \ --format="table(name,machineType,zone,status)"

verification.criterion: Machine type is e2-medium or e2-small (not n4-standard-4)

task.title: Verify no old europe-north1 resources remain
task.commands: gcloud artifacts repositories list --project=minivess-mlops gcloud sql instances list --project=minivess-mlops gsutil ls -L -b gs://minivess-mlops-dvc-data/ 2>&1 | grep Location
